debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ Tendsto (fun k => k * Real.sin (r / k)) atTop (nhds r)

proof:
rw [tendsto_congr' ((eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun k _ => mul_sin_as_div r k)]
  simp only [one_div]
  exact (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp <| tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff.2
    ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => inv_ne_zero⟩
failed_attempts:
refine Tendsto.congr' ?_ ((tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp ?_)
  · filter_upwards [eventually_ne_atTop 0] with k hk using mul_sin_as_div r k
  · rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
    exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => one_div_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  apply Tendsto.comp (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r)
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun k hk ↦ one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ ↦ one_div_ne_zero⟩

simp_rw [mul_sin_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp
  refine tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within _ tendsto_inv_atTop_zero ?_
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk using one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin ?_)
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
  exact one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, eventually_gt_atTop 0 |>.mono fun k hk ↦ one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div, one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_one]
  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within tendsto_inv_atTop_zero ?_)
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
  exact inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun k hk => one_div_ne_zero hk.ne'⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun k => one_div_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun k hk => inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  exact (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp <| tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff.2
    ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => inv_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun k hk ↦ inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk).symm⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  exact (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_inv_atTop_zero'.mono_right (nhdsWithin_mono 0 fun _ h => (ne_of_gt h).symm))

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  constructor
  · exact tendsto_inv_atTop_zero
  · filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk using (one_div_pos.2 hk).ne'

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun k hk => inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]

  refine ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, ?_⟩
  filter_upwards [gt_mem_atTop 0] with k hk
  exact one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

refine Tendsto.congr' ?_ ((tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp ?_)

    rw [mul_sin_as_div]
  · rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
    exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun k => one_div_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  refine tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within _ tendsto_inv_atTop_zero ?_
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
  exact inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

simp only [mul_sin_as_div, one_div]
  apply (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp

  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, filter_upwards [gt_mem_atTop 0] fun k hk ↦ (inv_pos.2 hk).ne'⟩

simp only [mul_sin_as_div, one_div]
  exact (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff.2 ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, ?_⟩)

simp only [mul_sin_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within _ tendsto_inv_atTop_zero ?_)
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk using inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

convert (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp _ using 1

  refine (tendsto_sin_rx_over_x r).comp <| tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff.2

  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun _ h => one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt h)⟩
